name: Awards & Recognition
title: Awards & Recognition
overview: Recognized by leading industry bodies for our transformative impact on enterprise AI. Showcasing milestones, accolades, and global participation that define our commitment to engineering the future.
description: Recognized by leading industry bodies for our transformative impact on enterprise AI. Showcasing milestones, accolades, and global participation that define our commitment to engineering the future.

capabilities.title: Andhra Pradesh MSME Digital Empowerment Challenge 2025
capabilities.subtitle: AP MSME Digital Empowerment Challenge 2025
capabilities.description: CittaAI proudly secured a double victory at the AP MSME Digital Empowerment Challenge 2025, organized by the Andhra Pradesh Innovation Society (APIS) and APMSME Development Corporation.
aliases: andhra pradesh msme digital empowerment challenge 2025

features.title: Winner — AI-Powered DPR Preparation Solution
features.description: Award victory details: Winner — AI-Powered DPR Preparation Solution

features.title: Winner — SaaS-Based Export Console
features.description: Award victory details: Winner — SaaS-Based Export Console

benefits: These achievements reinforce our dedication to empowering MSMEs through cutting-edge AI, data-driven precision, and scalable digital tools. We extend our gratitude to APIS, APMSME, and the evaluation committee — and to our team for turning vision into impact.

capabilities.title: Best AI Startup of the Year — 2025
capabilities.subtitle: Best AI Startup of the Year 2025 - HYBIZ TV Business Excellence Awards
capabilities.description: CittaAI has been honored as the "Best AI Startup of the Year" at the 3rd Edition of the HYBIZ TV Business Excellence Awards 2025.
aliases: best ai startup of the year — 2025
benefits: At CittaAI, we are just getting started. This award fuels our passion to continue building scalable, future-ready AI solutions that deliver measurable impact across industries.
